type: Already created variation group id can be set in id_variation_group field, it must exist.
type field can have an opton from (custom, feature, reference, isbn, ean13, upc)
If the type is set as feature only then id_feature field need to be set and must be id of an existing product feature.
Multiple values can be set in fileds (products, categories, manufacturers) separeting by comma. These fileds are optional can be empty.
Set 0  or 1 in filed active  to enable or disable the variation.
